# Brand Context — acme

Loaded by AI agents on every interaction. Generated from `.brand/` — edit there, not here. Re-run `brand-cli refresh-context` (or `/brand-context:extract`) to regenerate.

## Identity

_Run `/brand-context:extract` to populate from brand sources._

## Deeper context

Load these files when their domain comes up:

- `.brand/tokens/colors.md` — Color tokens
- `.brand/tokens/typography.md` — Typography tokens
- `.brand/tokens/spacing.md` — Spacing tokens
- `.brand/tokens/surfaces.md` — Radius and shadow tokens
- `.brand/voice.md` — Full voice rules
- `.brand/composition/anti-patterns.md` — Composition anti-patterns
- `.brand/conflicts.md` — Active brand conflicts
